---
name: Article feedback
about: Submit a correction, counterargument, source, or substantive critique
title: "[Feedback] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ""
---

## Passage or claim

Identify the exact passage, section, or claim.

## Type of feedback

- [ ] Factual correction
- [ ] Counterargument
- [ ] Supporting source
- [ ] Conflicting source
- [ ] Logical or methodological concern
- [ ] Terminology clarification
- [ ] Editorial correction

## Explanation

Explain the issue or proposed improvement.

## Evidence or source

Provide relevant evidence, reasoning, or a source citation.

## Effect on the article

Does this affect the central thesis, a supporting argument, or only the presentation?
